steps.t: Aiglos can be found in Dor Amarth. You should travel back to Aiglos to assess the situation.
A wounded devoted can be found near Aiglos. You should confront the wounded devoted from the Order of the Eye.
A wounded devoted can be found near Aiglos. You should confront the wounded devoted from the Order of the Eye.
Legolas can be found near Aiglos in Dor Amarth. You should speak with Legolas.
